sessionStart.bash:
cfg="${COPILOT_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}/.github/copilot/team.toml"; legacy="${COPILOT_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}/.claude/team.config"; if [ -f "$cfg" ]; then printf '=== mARC :: per-repo team.toml (channel topic) ===
'; cat "$cfg"; printf '
=== end team.toml ===
'; elif [ -f "$legacy" ]; then printf '[mARC] DEPRECATED: .claude/team.config found but mARC now reads .github/copilot/team.toml only — re-run /marc:init (or convert by hand from docs/team.toml.example) to migrate; the old file is no longer parsed.
'; else printf '[mARC] no .github/copilot/team.toml in this repo — @techlead will fall back to runtime discovery (gh repo view / gh project list). Add one from docs/team.toml.example to pin repo/project facts.
'; fi; data="${COPILOT_PLUGIN_DATA:-$HOME/.copilot/plugin-data/marc}"; mkdir -p "$data/scripts"; cand="$(find "$HOME/.copilot/installed-plugins" -maxdepth 5 -type f \( -path '*/marc/plugin.json' -o -path '*/marc/.claude-plugin/plugin.json' \) 2>/dev/null | head -n1)"; if [ -n "$cand" ]; then case "$cand" in */.claude-plugin/plugin.json) root="${cand%/.claude-plugin/plugin.json}" ;; */plugin.json) root="${cand%/plugin.json}" ;; *) root="" ;; esac; [ -n "$root" ] && cp -f "$root"/scripts/*.py "$data/scripts/" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; exit 0

postToolUse.bash: sent="${COPILOT_PLUGIN_DATA:-$HOME/.copilot/plugin-data/marc}/scripts/token_sentinel.py"; if [ -f "$sent" ] && command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 "$sent" --hook 2>/dev/null || true; fi; exit 0
